cases.description: Explicit diff request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: what have I customized compared to the latest Codi preset?
expectations: Clones the upstream Codi repo to a temp directory
Produces a report with Your Improvements, Upstream Updates Available, Conflicts, and Summary

cases.prompt: I want to contribute some of my rules back to Codi — show me what's different first
expectations: Recommends running codi-artifact-contributor next for the PR flow
Does NOT invoke a non-existent codi-contribute skill

cases.prompt: show me what Codi has updated upstream since I installed it
expectations: Suggests `codi update` to pull managed_by:codi updates

cases.description: Installing a preset does NOT trigger compare-preset
cases.prompt: install the team-preset.zip into this project
expectations: Does NOT clone upstream or diff

cases.description: Creating a new preset does NOT trigger compare-preset
cases.prompt: create a preset from my current .codi directory
expectations: Does NOT attempt to diff against upstream
